alert.description: A component to display important messages or notifications to users.

carousel.description: An image or content slider with navigation controls. Multiple variants for different use cases.

checkbox.description: A control that allows the user to toggle between checked and not checked.

collapsible.description: An expandable content container for showing and hiding sections.
collapsible.title: Collapsible
common.analyticsContent: Your analytics data and reports will appear here.
common.basicDialogExample: This is a basic dialog example. Click outside or use the buttons to close.
common.contentForActiveTab: This is the content for the active tab.
common.deleteAccountPermanent: This will permanently delete your account and all associated data.
common.deleteAccountWarning: Your account will be deleted. This action is irreversible.

common.name: Name
common.overviewContent: Welcome to the overview tab. Here you will find a summary of your data.

common.reportsContent: View your detailed reports and analytics here.

common.sessionExpiring: Your session is about to expire

components.description: Browse all available AlpineUI components. Click on a component to see examples and usage.
components.title: Components
contextMenu.description: A contextual menu that appears on right-click.
contextMenu.title: Context Menu
datePicker.description: A component for selecting dates in an intuitive way.
datePicker.title: Datepicker
dialog.description: A modal dialog component for focused interactions and confirmations.
dialog.title: Dialog
drawer.description: A drawer component for mobile-friendly slide-out panels.
drawer.title: Drawer
dropdown.description: A collapsible menu for navigation, actions, and more.
dropdown.title: Dropdown
home.cta.subtitle: Join hundreds of developers using AlpineUI to create stunning interfaces.
home.cta.title: Ready to build something beautiful?
home.features.accessibleDesc: WCAG 2.1 compliant components with proper ARIA attributes and keyboard navigation.
home.features.composableDesc: Mix and match components to create complex UIs. Each piece works seamlessly with others.
home.features.copyPasteDesc: Just copy the component code and paste it into your project. Full control, no black-box components.
home.features.customizableDesc: Customize with Tailwind utility classes or override CSS variables to match your brand.
home.features.fastDesc: Built on Alpine.js, the 15kB JavaScript framework. Your projects stay fast and lightweight.
home.features.subtitle: Built for developers who value simplicity, performance, and beautiful design.
home.features.title: Why choose AlpineUI?
home.features.zeroDepsDesc: No runtime dependencies. Just HTML, CSS, and JavaScript. Fewer bugs, smaller bundles.
home.hero.subtitle: A collection of beautifully designed, copy-and-paste components for Alpine.js. Styled with CSS variables - customize with utility classes or override variables to match your brand.
home.preview.description: A collection of reusable components that help you build beautiful interfaces faster.
home.preview.label: Alpine.js Component Preview
home.preview.subtitle: Hand-crafted components with attention to every detail. From buttons to dialogs, every component is designed to perfection.
home.preview.title: Components that shine
home.quickstart.copyPasteDesc: Browse components, copy the HTML, and paste into your project.
home.quickstart.requirementsDesc: Alpine.js 3.x + Tailwind CSS (already using them? Just paste!)
home.quickstart.subtitle: AlpineUI is a copy-paste component library. No CLI, no npm install — just copy the HTML.
home.quickstart.title: Get started in seconds
home.showcase.desc: From basic building blocks to complex interactive components, AlpineUI has everything you need to create beautiful web applications.
home.showcase.item2: Dark mode support out of the box
home.showcase.title: Everything you need to build stunning interfaces
input.description: A form input component with validation, icons, and various states.
input.title: Input
installation.buildToolDesc: If you use Vite, Next.js, or another build tool, just install Alpine.js and Tailwind CSS normally, then copy any component HTML directly into your templates.
installation.description: AlpineUI is a copy-paste component library. No CLI, no npm install — just copy the HTML and use it.
installation.exampleDesc: Here is a complete example using Alpine.js + Tailwind CSS. No extra files needed:
installation.prerequisitesDesc: Before using AlpineUI, make sure you have:
installation.step1: Navigate to the component page you want to use
installation.step2: Click the "Code" tab to see the HTML
installation.step4: Paste it into your project file
installation.title: Installation
installation.usageDesc: Browse any component page, copy the HTML code shown in the "Code" tab, and paste it directly into your project. Each component uses Tailwind utility classes for styling and Alpine.js directives for interactivity — no additional CSS required.
kbd.description: A component for displaying keyboard shortcuts.
kbd.title: Kbd
label.bioDescription: This will be displayed on your profile.
label.bioHelp: Tell us a little about yourself.

label.title: Label
nativeSelect.description: A native select component for forms.
nativeSelect.title: Native Select
nav.label: Label

site.title: AlpineUI - Beautiful components for Alpine.js

tabs.title: Tabs
textarea.title: Textarea
theming.description: Customize AlpineUI components to match your brand using Tailwind CSS utility classes or CSS variables.
theming.howItWorksDesc: Every component snippet uses standard Tailwind utility classes. To customize, just modify the classes in the copied HTML:

theming.title: Theming

toast.title: Toast

toggleGroup.description: A group of toggle buttons for selecting one or multiple options.
